# Source: Best EGCG and Vitamin C Supplements

> Captured for the metabolism curriculum — EGCG dose-response data for the antioxidant module.

## Capture

EGCG (epigallocatechin gallate) is the most studied catechin in green tea. Typical effective dose is 300–400 mg/day. Bioavailability is enhanced when taken with vitamin C and on an empty stomach. Hepatotoxicity risk emerges above 800 mg/day or with concentrated extracts; whole-leaf preparations show better safety profiles.
